title: T-012 — UI: FIN-002 Standard Costs List + MODAL-01/02/03/11 (fin_standard_costs_list + 4 modals)
prompt:
# T-012 — FIN-002 Standard Costs List + MODAL-01/02/03/11 UI

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.1 FIN-002; §8.5 MODAL-01/02/03/11 contracts; §5.3 21 CFR Part 11 e-signature; §11.2 V-FIN-STD-*.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototypes:
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/standard-screens.jsx:1-208` (`fin_standard_costs_list`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:21-101` (`std_cost_create_modal`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:103-175` (`approve_std_cost_modal`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:177-245` (`cost_history_modal`)
- `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:586-613` (`supersede_std_cost_modal`)

## Goal
Server Component page `/finance/standard-costs` with shadcn DataTable (TanStack), status tabs with counts, bulk-action bar, expandable rows (approval evidence), coverage Alert, and four embedded modals (Create/Approve/History/Supersede) — wiring to T-011 Server Actions.

## Prototype parity
References pinned above. shadcn primitives required (per index):
- List page: Table, TableHeader, TableRow, TableCell, TableBody, Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, Input, Select, Button, Badge, Alert, Checkbox.
- MODAL-01: Dialog, DialogContent, DialogFooter, Form, FormField, Input, Select, Textarea, Button, Alert.
- MODAL-02: Dialog, Form, Input (PIN), Checkbox, Button, Badge, Separator + PinInput (react-input-otp).
- MODAL-03: Dialog (wide), Table, Select, Badge, Button + Recharts LineChart (TrendChart wrapper).
- MODAL-11: Dialog, Alert, Button, Badge, Calendar, Popover.

Parity checklist:
1. Status tabs (All / Active / Pending / Draft / Superseded) bound to URL `?status=` via nuqs; counts via single GROUP BY query.
2. Filter bar: search Input, item-type Select, date-range DatePicker, cost-basis Select.
3. Bulk action bar (visible when ≥1 row selected): 'Bulk Approve' opens MODAL-02 in bulk mode.
4. DataTable columns: Code, Item Name, Item Type, Status badge (StdStatusBadge: active→green, pending→amber, draft→outline, superseded→secondary), Total Cost (mono GBP), Effective From, Effective To, Actions kebab.
5. Expandable row: shows approval record (avatar + sha256 hash truncated + timestamp) and notes; data from `getStandardCostAudit(id)` from T-011.
6. Coverage Alert (amber) when count of FG items WITHOUT active standard_cost > 0.
7. MODAL-01 (Create/Edit): live cost breakdown stack-bar (Progress) computed via useWatch on material/labor/overhead; >20% change Alert warn (server-fetched prior approved cost passed as prop); Cancel / Save Draft / Save & Submit footer; calls `createStandardCostDraft` / `submitForApproval`.
8. MODAL-02 (Approve): 2-phase render (form → success); PinInput (6 digits); old-vs-new cost diff cards; reason Textarea min 10; bulk path summary; success screen shows real SHA-256 hash returned from server.
9. MODAL-03 (History): version history Table with active row blue border; version-compare two Selects + diff; TrendChart of total_cost over time; 'Create New Version' button → closes & opens MODAL-01 prefilled.
10. MODAL-11 (Supersede): info Alert; DatePicker (min=effective_from of current); destructive-style 'Supersede' button calls `supersedeStandardCost`.

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/standard-costs/page.tsx` — RSC fetches first page + tab counts + coverage gap count in parallel.
2. `app/finance/standard-costs/_components/std-costs-table.tsx` — TanStack DataTable client.
3. `app/finance/standard-costs/_components/std-cost-create-modal.tsx` — MODAL-01.
4. `app/finance/standard-costs/_components/approve-std-cost-modal.tsx` — MODAL-02.
5. `app/finance/standard-costs/_components/cost-history-modal.tsx` — MODAL-03.
6. `app/finance/standard-costs/_components/supersede-std-cost-modal.tsx` — MODAL-11.
7. Shared `components/finance/_shared/std-status-badge.tsx`, `pin-input.tsx`, `summary-list.tsx`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_components/std-costs-table.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_components/std-cost-create-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_components/approve-std-cost-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_components/cost-history-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_components/supersede-std-cost-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/std-status-badge.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/pin-input.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_components/summary-list.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs/_components/__tests__/*.test.tsx [create] (one per component)

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given the page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/standard-screens.jsx:1-208, then 5 status tabs + 4 filter controls + 8 columns + expandable rows + coverage Alert match — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist. AND given MODAL-01 renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/modals.jsx:21-101, then live cost components + approval signature hash display correctly.
- Given MODAL-02, when PIN entered and Submit clicked, then approveStandardCost called with pin_proof, server returns audit hash, success screen displays it. AND given MODAL-02 bulk mode, when Submit succeeds, then result summary shows 'X of Y approved; Z failed'.
- Given MODAL-03, when 'Create New Version' clicked, then MODAL-03 closes and MODAL-01 opens prefilled. AND given MODAL-11, when supersede_date set before effective_from, then DatePicker rejects and Save disabled.
- Given user without fin.standard_cost.approve, when row Actions opened, then 'Approve' is hidden. AND given coverage Alert rendered, when clicked, then routes to filtered FG list missing std costs.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 9→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: write one test per modal + one for list page asserting parity + bulk action visibility + RBAC gating + flow handoffs (history → create prefilled, etc).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/standard-costs`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate per shadcn primitives.
- Do not compute SHA-256 client-side (PIN goes to server as plain string; server computes hash).
- Do not use HTML `<select>` instead of shadcn Select.
- Do not skip BL-FIN-07 placeholder for >20% dual sign-off (P1 = warn-only Alert; P2 = enforce second approver).
- Do not regress accessibility (axe).
- Do not show raw signature_hash strings without truncation in the UI (visual hygiene).
